title: Successful account creation with valid email and password meeting minimum length
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
No existing account with the email to be used
test_steps: Enter a valid unique email address (e.g., testuser@example.com)
Enter a password of exactly 8 characters (e.g., Pass1234)
expected_results: User receives a confirmation message (e.g., 'Account created successfully')
User is redirected to the login page or dashboard

title: Account creation rejected due to duplicate email
preconditions: An existing account with email 'existing@example.com' already exists in the system
User is on the account creation page
expected_results: An error message is displayed indicating that the email is already in use (e.g., 'Email already registered')

title: Account creation rejected due to password shorter than 8 characters
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
test_steps: Enter a valid unique email address (e.g., newuser@example.com)
Enter a password of 7 characters (e.g., Pass123)
expected_results: An error message is displayed indicating that the password must be at least 8 characters long

title: Account creation with password exactly at minimum boundary (8 characters)
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
No existing account with the email to be used
test_steps: Enter a valid unique email address (e.g., boundary@example.com)
Enter a password of exactly 8 characters (e.g., Pass1234)
expected_results: User receives a confirmation message (e.g., 'Account created successfully')
User is redirected to the login page or dashboard

title: Account creation with password just below minimum boundary (7 characters)
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
test_steps: Enter a valid unique email address (e.g., belowboundary@example.com)
Enter a password of 7 characters (e.g., Pass123)
expected_results: An error message is displayed indicating that the password must be at least 8 characters long

title: Account creation rejected due to duplicate email with case-insensitive match
preconditions: An existing account with email 'existing@example.com' already exists in the system
User is on the account creation page
test_steps: Enter the email address 'Existing@Example.com' (same email with different case)
expected_results: An error message is displayed indicating that the email is already in use

title: Account creation rejected due to empty password
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
test_steps: Enter a valid unique email address (e.g., emptypwd@example.com)
Leave the confirm password field empty
expected_results: An error message is displayed indicating that the password must be at least 8 characters long

title: Account creation rejected due to password with only spaces (8 spaces)
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
test_steps: Enter a valid unique email address (e.g., spaces@example.com)
Enter a password consisting of 8 space characters
expected_results: An error message is displayed indicating that the password must be at least 8 characters long

title: Account creation rejected due to password confirmation mismatch
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
test_steps: Enter a valid unique email address (e.g., mismatch@example.com)
Enter a password of 8 characters (e.g., Pass1234)
Enter a different password in the confirm password field (e.g., Pass5678)
expected_results: An error message is displayed indicating that the passwords do not match

title: Account creation rejected due to empty email field
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
test_steps: Enter a valid password of 8 characters (e.g., Pass1234)
expected_results: An error message is displayed indicating that the email is required or invalid

title: Account creation rejected due to email with leading/trailing spaces
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
No existing account with the email 'testuser@example.com'
test_steps: Enter the email address ' testuser@example.com ' (with leading and trailing spaces)
Enter a valid password of 8 characters (e.g., Pass1234)
expected_results: Account creation fails or the email is trimmed and account is created
If trimmed, the account is created successfully with the email 'testuser@example.com'
If not trimmed, an error message is displayed indicating invalid email format

title: Account creation rejected due to duplicate email with same email after trimming spaces
preconditions: An existing account with email 'existing@example.com' already exists in the system
User is on the account creation page
test_steps: Enter the email address ' existing@example.com ' (with leading and trailing spaces)
expected_results: An error message is displayed indicating that the email is already in use

title: Account creation rejected due to duplicate email with special characters in email
preconditions: An existing account with email 'test.user+alias@example.com' already exists in the system
User is on the account creation page
expected_results: An error message is displayed indicating that the email is already in use

title: Account creation rejected due to duplicate email with subdomain variation
preconditions: An existing account with email 'user@sub.example.com' already exists in the system
User is on the account creation page
expected_results: An error message is displayed indicating that the email is already in use

title: Account creation rejected due to duplicate email with plus addressing
preconditions: An existing account with email 'user+test@example.com' already exists in the system
User is on the account creation page
expected_results: An error message is displayed indicating that the email is already in use
